seed_pages.title: Human-AI interaction
seed_pages.note: Broad discovery hub for interaction effects, perception, and social dynamics.

seed_pages.title: Automation bias
seed_pages.note: Primary hub for over-reliance, misuse, omission, commission, and complacency.

seed_pages.title: Algorithm aversion
seed_pages.note: Primary hub for aversion, appreciation, transparency, and accountability concerns.

seed_pages.title: AI anthropomorphism
seed_pages.note: Hub for human-likeness cues, social attribution, and personification of AI.

seed_pages.title: ELIZA effect
seed_pages.note: Hub for conversational over-attribution to machine outputs.

seed_pages.title: Hallucination (artificial intelligence)
seed_pages.note: Hub for confident error, confabulation, and false certainty in LLM output.

seed_pages.title: Sycophancy
seed_pages.note: Hub for agreement-seeking behavior and user-confirming model responses.

seed_pages.title: Algorithmic bias
seed_pages.note: Hub for stereotyping, representational harms, and fairness failures in user-facing systems.

seed_pages.title: Fairness (machine learning)
seed_pages.note: Hub for fairness framing, protected attributes, and mitigation discourse.

seed_pages.title: Filter bubble
seed_pages.note: Hub for personalization, ranking, curation, and narrowed exposure.

seed_pages.title: Echo chamber (media)
seed_pages.note: Hub for belief reinforcement through repeated, like-minded content.

seed_pages.title: Authority bias
seed_pages.note: Hub for credibility shortcuts that transfer well to AI interfaces.
